programmes.show_description: Heroin addict Missy is visited by her sugar daddy, who gives her the cash she needs to fund her habit. The secret romance between inmates Franklin and Leslie continues to blossom.
Inmate Rachel fails a drug test, and the full weight of prison rule comes down on her. Meanwhile, phlebotomist Julia has been charged with the murder of her ex-boyfriend.
Louis meets an eccentric cosmetic surgeon as he investigates image obsession in California - the birthplace of plastic surgery. Will he be tempted to go under the knife?
In a dramatic start to the new series, the West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia.

programmes.show_description: Wry observer of oddballs Louis Theroux turns his attention to the Phelps clan who picket America, promoting an intolerance of gay life.

...Most Hated Family in Crisis. Following up on his 2007 documentary, The Most Hated Family in America, Louis Theroux returns to Topeka, Kansas, for a week-long visit with the Westboro Baptist Church.

programmes.show_description: The journalist meets Americans prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.
When travelling musician and drug user Carmen goes into multiple seizures in the jail's intake area, officers call a 'Code Blue' emergency as staff and paramedics scramble to respond.
Hard-working ambulance crews help a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall.
